steps.t: Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. Prince Ingór wishes to talk to you.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should collect some draughts, ales, and bread in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should pack up all the items into a care package in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should collect the care package in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should give the care package to the visiting Longbeard emissary in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. Prince Ingór wishes to talk to you.
